title: Surat Thani、Surat Thani — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Surat Thani、Surat Thaniの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

Surat ThaniはSurat Thaniにある人口130,000の都市です。The gateway to the Gulf of Thailand islands, this provincial capital offers a very low cost of living and easy access to Koh Samui, Koh Phangan, and Koh Tao.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
